settings.name: Vivek Panchal
settings.title: Backend Engineer
settings.summary: Backend Engineer at CoinDCX building high-scale, low-latency distributed systems with strong focus on reliability, compliance, and product impact.

description: Cut P99 latency ~70% (41ms to 12ms) on validate_token (~6M req/hr, 1.7K RPS) by designing a Redis hash-map cache (cache-aside + TTL + invalidation), eliminating ~95% PostgreSQL SELECTs.

Built a Kafka-backed event-routing layer in the Customer Engagement Service integrating AppsFlyer S2S attribution across 4 apps with idempotent event IDs, retries, and DLQ; sustained <2ms per-event overhead.
Reduced KYC median TAT 65% (148s to 52s) for 20M+ users by architecting Reverse Penny Drop flow on Ruby on Rails, driving +5% KYC to BAV and +6% Signup to NAP conversion uplift.
Reduced daily session drops 80% (800+ to 150) across iOS, Android, and Web by root-causing auto-logout issues using Datadog distributed traces and PagerDuty triage.
Engineered a vendor-agnostic sanctions-screening adapter with active-active failover (LexisNexis to Zigram), delivering zero-downtime migration and full audit traceability.
Improved city-level GeoIP accuracy from 61% to 97% by automating MaxMind refreshes with GitHub Actions CI/CD, reducing location decisioning errors to <3%.
Lifted user retention 20% by rearchitecting mentor-dashboard data flows and community-feed pagination on Node.js and MongoDB for 600+ active users.
Shipped booking, editing, and cancellation REST APIs end-to-end and resolved 15+ production bugs across scheduling and payment workflows, reducing reported errors by ~30%.
Designed and shipped a JWT + RBAC authentication service on Node.js + TypeScript with secure session management and multi-role access control.
Engineered compound-indexed MongoDB schemas reducing feed-query P95 latency ~40%, and built content APIs for posts, stories, and events with optimized aggregations.

items.title: LLD Playground
items.description: Built 37 production-grade low-level design problems (Parking Lot, Elevator, Splitwise, Notification Service, Rate Limiter) using SOLID and GoF patterns; attracted 5,000+ developers from 30+ countries organically.

items.title: Study Notion
items.description: Built a full-stack EdTech platform with 10,000+ unique visitors including course CRUD, instructor payouts, JWT + RBAC auth, Razorpay payment flows via idempotent webhooks, and Cloudinary media delivery.

items.title: Solved 900+ LeetCode problems with peak rating 1714
items.description: All India Rank 359 in Biweekly Contest 105.

items.title: 120,000+ LeetCode editorial views and 1,000+ stars
items.description: Consistent technical content with strong community adoption.

items.title: Built LLD Playground used by 5,000+ developers
items.description: Reached 30+ countries as a practical LLD interview prep resource.
